productDisplayName: Nike Men AS Manu Auth CL N98 Red Jackets
description: CompositionRed jacket made of 53% polyester and 47% cotton, has a mock collar with a full front zipper, full sleeves with a black panel running from the shoulder to the cuffs, ribbed cuffs, neck and hem with white tipping, appliqued manchester united badge on the left chest, and has zippered pockets at the waistFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean, bleach, use softeners or allow to lay on itself when wetTumble dry lowRemove immediately Cool ironEnjoy the winter in style with hot street food or a heated game of soccer with this Manchester United jacket from nike. Crafted from a cotton-polyester blend fabric, this jacket is designed to keep you warm. Layer it over jeans and t-shirts.
